title: feat: add community image endpoints
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds image modality support to community endpoints across Enter, Gen, D1, and the Community Image model category.
- Routes saved OpenAI-compatible `/v1/images/generations` providers through `/image/{prompt}` and `/v1/images/generations`; accepts provider URL/base64 responses while exposing community OpenAI generations as `b64_json` only.
- Bills valid OpenAI image token usage per token, otherwise charges the registrant-defined fixed Pollen price once per successful generated image.
- Uses one Drizzle migration/snapshot and documents registration, pricing, routing limitations, and the edits follow-up #12645 in source guides/OpenAPI.
- Includes Sharktide’s staging access; validated with typechecks, builds, focused tests, a fresh D1 migration, and live staging.

gist.headline: The community grows pixels
gist.blurb: Community endpoints can now make images, not just words. Register an OpenAI-compatible image provider, set its Pollen price, and let the hive route prompts into pixels.
gist.summary: Added image modality support for community endpoints, routing registered OpenAI-compatible providers through both `/image/{prompt}` and `/v1/images/generations` with per-token or per-image Pollen billing.
gist.impact: Community model registrants can offer image generation through Pollinations’ standard image APIs, while users receive compatible community OpenAI generation results as `b64_json` images.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Polli as a friendly image-provider gardener, connecting a community-built retro image machine to two labeled API pipes: `/image/{prompt}` and `/v1/images/generations`. Fresh pixel artworks emerge as small base64-style picture tiles, with a price tag made of Pollen beside the machine; code-plants and flowers show that community infrastructure is growing into a new modality.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene in a warm garden hackerspace where Polli, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with black oval eyes, pink rectangular cheek blushes, light blue translucent wings, and a tiny painter's beret, tends a community image-generation machine connected to two friendly retro API pipes labeled `/image` and `v1/images`. Small glowing pixel picture tiles sprout from code-plants beside a Pollen price tag, with lime green (#ecf874) prominent among mint, lavender, peach, and warm cream pastels; cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene in a warm garden hackerspace where Polli, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with black oval eyes, pink rectangular cheek blushes, light blue translucent wings, and a tiny painter's beret, tends a community image-generation machine connected to two friendly retro API pipes labeled `/image` and `v1/images`. Small glowing pixel picture tiles sprout from code-plants beside a Pollen price tag, with lime green (#ecf874) prominent among mint, lavender, peach, and warm cream pastels; cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.
